headline: All Hail King Jesus: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: All Hail King Jesus is projected #7 of 16 with a 626.00 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Jaxon Smith-Njigba, Amon-Ra St. Brown, and Tee Higgins. The immediate priority is improving the RB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.5 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the RB slot above Zach Charbonnet's 51.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 66.3 C-AVI would directly attack the 14.70-point projected gap to Ravens Regime.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On October 14, Southside Savages traded with Roster 3 and acquired Tetairoa McMillan while sending 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages), 2026 Round 2 (Southside Savages). Tetairoa McMillan is now the current WR starter at 85.6 C-AVI and 87.2 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

rival_below.summary: On October 14, Southside Savages traded with Roster 3 and acquired Tetairoa McMillan while sending 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages), 2026 Round 2 (Southside Savages). Tetairoa McMillan is now the current WR starter at 85.6 C-AVI and 87.2 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #7 of 16 at 626.00 lineup C-AVI. Ravens Regime is immediately above at 640.70, a gap of 14.70. Southside Savages is immediately behind at 625.80.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jaxon Smith-Njigba (99.1), Amon-Ra St. Brown (98.6), and Tee Higgins (81.9).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.5 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the RB slot above Zach Charbonnet's 51.6 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 66.3 C-AVI would directly attack the 14.70-point projected gap to Ravens Regime. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Zach Charbonnet is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 51.6. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
